title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5 With Unprecedented Reasoning Capabilities
description: OpenAI has announced GPT-5, claiming major leaps in reasoning, multimodal understanding, and coding. The model reportedly scores near-human on several benchmark tests.

title: Google DeepMind Achieves Breakthrough in Protein Folding 2.0
description: DeepMind researchers have developed an improved AI system capable of predicting protein structures with near-atomic accuracy, potentially revolutionizing drug discovery.

title: Meta Releases Open-Source AI Model That Rivals Proprietary Systems
description: Meta AI has open-sourced its latest large language model, which benchmarks suggest competes with top closed-source models from OpenAI and Anthropic.

title: Apple Vision Pro Gets Major Software Update With AI Features
description: Apple has released visionOS 2.0 introducing AI-powered spatial computing features, including real-time translation and context-aware virtual overlays.

title: Cybersecurity Researchers Uncover Massive Data Breach Affecting Millions
description: A critical vulnerability in a popular cloud storage platform exposed personal data of over 50 million users worldwide, including emails and encrypted passwords.

title: Electric Vehicle Sales Surge as Battery Costs Hit Record Low
description: Global EV sales reached a new milestone as lithium-ion battery prices dropped below $100 per kWh for the first time, making electric cars cost-competitive with gasoline vehicles.

title: Federal Reserve Holds Interest Rates Steady Amid Inflation Concerns
description: The Federal Reserve kept benchmark interest rates unchanged at its latest meeting, citing mixed economic signals and persistent inflation in the services sector.

title: Amazon Expands Same-Day Delivery to 50 New Cities
description: Amazon announced it will extend its same-day Prime delivery service to 50 additional metropolitan areas in North America, intensifying competition with Walmart and Target.

title: Stock Markets Rally on Strong Jobs Report Data
description: Wall Street indexes climbed sharply after the Labor Department reported 250,000 new jobs added in November, beating analyst expectations and easing recession fears.

title: Tesla Reports Record Quarterly Deliveries Despite Competition
description: Tesla delivered over 500,000 vehicles in Q4, a company record, even as Chinese rivals BYD and NIO continue to gain market share in Asia and Europe.

title: Premier League Title Race Heats Up as Top Four Teams Level on Points
description: An exciting weekend of fixtures left Manchester City, Arsenal, Liverpool, and Chelsea all within two points of each other at the Premier League summit.

title: NBA Star LeBron James Breaks All-Time Scoring Record Again
description: LeBron James added another chapter to his legendary career by surpassing his own all-time NBA scoring record during a nationally televised game against the Celtics.

title: Tennis: Jannik Sinner Wins ATP Finals to End Historic Season
description: World No. 1 Jannik Sinner capped a dominant season by claiming the ATP Finals title in Turin, defeating Novak Djokovic in a thrilling three-set final.

title: FIFA Announces New 48-Team World Cup Format for 2026
description: FIFA has confirmed the detailed schedule and group stage format for the expanded 2026 World Cup, to be co-hosted by the United States, Canada, and Mexico.

title: Olympic Games Paris 2024 Legacy Report Highlights Record Attendance
description: A comprehensive legacy report from Paris 2024 showed record ticket sales, global viewership of 4 billion, and significant infrastructure improvements across the French capital.

title: New Study Links Ultra-Processed Foods to Increased Dementia Risk
description: Researchers at Harvard Medical School found that diets high in ultra-processed foods were associated with a 28% higher risk of cognitive decline and dementia in adults over 60.

title: WHO Declares New Mpox Variant a Global Health Emergency
description: The World Health Organization has declared a new clade of mpox a public health emergency of international concern after cases spread to 15 countries outside Africa.

title: Revolutionary Cancer Vaccine Shows 90% Efficacy in Melanoma Trial
description: A personalized mRNA cancer vaccine developed by BioNTech and Merck demonstrated 90% efficacy in preventing melanoma recurrence in a Phase 3 clinical trial with 1,000 patients.

title: Mental Health Crisis Among Teenagers Worsens, CDC Report Finds
description: A new CDC report reveals that rates of depression, anxiety, and suicidal ideation among US teenagers have risen sharply over the past decade, reaching historic highs.

title: Breakthrough Gene Therapy Cures Hereditary Blindness in Clinical Trial
description: Scientists at the University of Pennsylvania successfully restored vision in patients with a rare genetic form of blindness using a one-time CRISPR-based gene editing treatment.

title: Netflix Announces Record Subscriber Growth Driven by Live Events
description: Netflix added 15 million new subscribers in Q3, crediting live sports broadcasts, including an NFL game on Christmas Day, and its expanding games library for the surge.

title: Taylor Swift's Eras Tour Becomes Highest-Grossing Concert Tour in History
description: Taylor Swift's Eras Tour has officially surpassed $2 billion in gross revenue, making it the highest-earning concert tour ever, eclipsing Elton John's Farewell Yellow Brick Road.

title: Hollywood Blockbuster Breaks Opening Weekend Box Office Record
description: Marvel's latest superhero film shattered global box office records with a $400 million opening weekend, the biggest in cinema history, driven by record IMAX ticket sales.

title: Spotify Launches AI-Generated Personalized Radio Stations
description: Spotify has rolled out AI DJ 2.0, which creates fully personalized radio stations based on listening history, mood, and real-time context using generative AI music curation.

title: Emmy Awards Ceremony Sets New Viewership Record With Diverse Nominations
description: The 76th Emmy Awards drew a record 18 million viewers, boosted by historic diversity in nominations across drama, comedy, and limited series categories.

title: Climate Summit COP29 Reaches Landmark Carbon Reduction Agreement
description: Nearly 200 nations signed a new climate accord at COP29 in Baku, committing to halve carbon emissions by 2035 and triple renewable energy capacity globally.

title: SpaceX Successfully Lands Starship Booster for Second Time
description: SpaceX completed a milestone test of its Starship mega-rocket system, successfully catching the Super Heavy booster using the launch tower's mechanical arms for the second time.

title: Global Hunger Crisis Worsens as Conflict Disrupts Food Supply Chains
description: The UN World Food Programme warns that over 280 million people face acute food insecurity, driven by conflicts in Sudan, Gaza, and Myanmar disrupting agricultural supply chains.

title: Scientists Discover New Deep-Sea Species in Pacific Ocean Expedition
description: Marine biologists exploring the Mariana Trench identified 37 previously unknown deep-sea species including bioluminescent jellyfish and a new genus of amphipod crustacean.

title: Quantum Computing Milestone: IBM Demonstrates 1000-Qubit Processor
description: IBM unveiled its Condor quantum processor featuring 1,121 qubits, marking a major step toward practical quantum advantage in simulating chemical and materials processes.
